noDataDesc: Import a CSV file with tick data or OHLCV bars to get started. The data will be automatically converted to Parquet format for fast processing.
tzOffsetHint: Timezone applied to timestamps at import time. Select UTC+0 if data is already in UTC.

tzTransform.title: Transform Timezone
tzTransform.desc: Shift all timestamps of "{{name}}" to a new timezone. This rewrites the stored data files.

import.title: Import CSV Data
import.desc: Select a CSV file with tick data or OHLCV bars and configure the instrument settings.

downloadDialog.title: Download Historical Data
downloadDialog.desc: Download free tick data from Dukascopy servers. Select an instrument, date range, and configure settings.
downloadDialog.customSymbolHint: Or enter a custom Dukascopy symbol
downloadDialog.tickDesc: Raw tick data (Bid/Ask/Volume). Larger files, highest precision.
downloadDialog.m1Desc: Aggregated 1-minute OHLCV bars. Smaller files, faster processing.
downloadDialog.symbolNameHint: Rename to avoid duplicates when downloading the same instrument multiple times.
downloadDialog.alreadyDownloading: This symbol is already being downloaded.
downloadDialog.storageFormatParquetDesc: Compressed columnar format. Compatible with Polars tooling and data inspection.
downloadDialog.storageFormatBinaryDesc: Flat binary: 32 bytes/tick. Fastest load time for large datasets — no parsing overhead.
downloadDialog.pipelineDirectDesc: Downloads bi5 data directly to storage — fastest option.
downloadDialog.pipelineViaCsvDesc: Routes through an intermediate CSV — identical to manual CSV import. Use if Direct results differ.
downloadDialog.retryOnEmpty: Retry hours that return empty data
downloadDialog.useCache: Cache bi5 files to disk (avoids re-downloading)
